case_title: HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC VS. TRISTAN PROTO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PROTO, TRISTAN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210056993), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC SERVED NOV-22-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-22-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT PROTO, TRISTAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROTO, TRISTAN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 360 HYPE STREET #404, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94109, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210056993) (TRANSACTION ID # 210056993)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210056993), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC SERVED NOV-22-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO 585 CCP IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77515388) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROTO, TRISTAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $5,225.00 RENT, $533.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,758.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $47.50 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 210056993) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PROTO, TRISTAN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 77515388) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
